notes: Seed err-2: commit 45c7eaeb29d6 — thermal_of_populate_bind_params() missed error-return-code assignment on two goto-cleanup paths (!count, !__tcbp).
POC regenerated once: round 1 had structural mismatches (POC lacked enough acquire/release/if/goto/return structure); round 2 mirrored seed-slice structurally and passed verifier-v1 STRICT.
Quirk: gcc-compiled empty `int main(void){}` causes CodeQL to count an implicit ReturnStmt, breaking F5.return. Solution: drop main; verifier-v1 does not require it.
Query iter 1 compiled & fired 4 rows: 2 true bugs in _buggy + 2 false positives in both _buggy and _fixed at inner `if (ret < 0) goto free_tcbp` (where ret was just assigned the call result).
Query iter 2: added `not checked = ret` clause to exclude self-checks of the status variable. Result: 2 rows, both inside _buggy, none in _fixed. Oracle PASS.
POC frozen at sha256 24b93d4d... and verified unchanged after query iterations (no drift).

Query is generic: detects any function where an if-block tests a non-status-variable error condition, then `goto`s a cleanup label that returns a status variable, without assigning an error code to that status variable in the if-then block.
